value.found_quote: Anthropic's Claude models are available through Vertex AI. ... Claude is also available through Amazon Bedrock, Claude Platform on AWS, and Microsoft Foundry.
value.rationale: The page explicitly confirms that Anthropic offers Claude on third-party cloud platforms. It directly states that Claude models are available through Google Cloud's Vertex AI, and also mentions availability on Amazon Bedrock, Claude Platform on AWS, and Microsoft Foundry — all third-party platforms. The page provides detailed API documentation, SDK examples, and model listings for these integrations, indicating they are generally available (active) offerings.
